title: crotalaria urbaniana
intro: Crotalaria urbaniana, also known as Urban's rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria urbaniana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria urbaniana can be made by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and crushing the plant to use as a powder or capsule.
